message:
🐛 fix: /analytics page stuck loading due to CSP blocking inline script (#6127)

The hardened CSP from #5971 removed `script-src 'unsafe-inline'`, but
analytics.html still had a ~1060-line inline `<script>` block. The
browser blocks it with "Refused to execute a script because its hash,
its nonce, or 'unsafe-inline' does not appear in the script-src
directive of the Content Security Policy", leaving the page stuck on
the "Loading analytics data..." spinner.

Extract the inline script to /public/analytics.js, mirroring the
pattern already used for /secure-context-check.js. The HTML now
references it via `<script src="/analytics.js"></script>`, which is
allowed by `script-src 'self'`.

No JS logic changes — this is a pure file split.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
